$comment: Configuration for the API surface parity tests (ApiSurfaceParityTests, ElementMethodInvocationTests). 'enabled' is flipped to true by the wa-upgrade process once expected-api-surface.json matches the version being implemented. Overrides document intentional naming deviations of the Blazor wrappers - typically idiomatic .NET PascalCase word splits (e.g. maxlength -> MaxLength, autofocus -> AutoFocus) that differ from mechanical kebab-case conversion; ignores document intentional omissions (each ignore should carry a reason in 'ignoreReasons'). 'nativeElementMethods' lists DOM methods valid on any element; per-component 'extraElementMethods' allowlists element methods that exist in the Web Awesome source but are not CEM-documented - these MUST be re-verified against the target version's source on every upgrade (the CEM diff cannot see them).

ignoreReasons.title: native HTML attribute, passed through via AdditionalAttributes
ignoreReasons.change: native change event folded into Blazor two-way binding (ValueChanged / @bind-Value)
ignoreReasons.name: form-control name is handled by Blazor InputBase form integration (NameAttributeValue / EditContext), not a discrete parameter
ignoreReasons.checked: checkbox checked state is the two-way-bound Value on WaInputBase<bool>
ignoreReasons.visiblePixelsInViewport: wa-page internal scroll-gap layout helper (takes a live HTMLElement arg; its own doc comment cites a StackOverflow scroll-fill fix) - not a consumer-facing API and not marshalable from Blazor
ignoreReasons.maxlength: exposed as MaxLength on WaInputBase (idiomatic .NET casing); mapped via attributeOverrides
ignoreReasons.minlength: exposed as MinLength on WaInputBase (idiomatic .NET casing); mapped via attributeOverrides
ignoreReasons.getSymbol: function-valued property (custom symbol renderer callback), not an authorable HTML attribute
ignoreReasons.currentSlide: read-only JS state property of wa-carousel, not an authorable HTML attribute
ignoreReasons.slides: read-only JS collection property of wa-carousel, not an authorable HTML attribute
ignoreReasons.submenuOpen: read-only JS state property of wa-dropdown-item, not an authorable HTML attribute
ignoreReasons.extraElementMethods:stopObserver/startOb: observer control methods, browser-verified on the live WA 3.0.0 elements (2026-07-19) after the disconnect/reconnect rename incident and source-re-verified against WA 3.1.0 (2026-07-22), WA 3.2.0 (2026-07-23) and WA 3.2.1 (2026-07-23), still present as private methods in mutation-observer.d.ts/resize-observer.d.ts; the CEM reports empty methods for both observers, so renames here are invisible to the upgrade diff - re-verify each upgrade
ignoreReasons.extraElementMethods:update: wa-relative-time refresh method, browser-verified on the live WA 3.0.0 element (2026-07-19) and source-re-verified against WA 3.1.0 (2026-07-22), WA 3.2.0 (2026-07-23) and WA 3.2.1 (2026-07-23, the Lit ReactiveElement lifecycle update() inherited via WebAwesomeElement, hence absent from the component .d.ts - only updateTimeout appears in relative-time.d.ts), not CEM-documented
